message:
fix(security): reject double-trailing-dot hostname bypass in SSRF policy and network guard

Replace trim_end_matches('.') with strip_suffix('.') (removes exactly one
dot) so hostnames like api.example.com.. can no longer bypass allow-list
matching. Add has_multiple_trailing_dots guard in ssrf_policy that also
fires in is_private_ip and check_ssrf, returning SsrfInvalidIp.

Tests cover exact-match and wildcard bypass attempts in network guard,
plus is_private_ip, check_ssrf, and allowlist bypass in SSRF policy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
